title: Shorter Swords
description: Swords are now shorter to give you a better view of the battlefield!
body:

[<center>![Discord Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/FVH3GaMHJz)
[![Modrinth Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/shader/shorter-swords-pack)
[![Ko-fi Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Kofi-Button-64.png)</center>](https://ko-fi.com/titan1um)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

**This resource pack makes swords shorter to give you a better view of the battlefield!**

ℹ️*All images* below *and in the* Gallery *were taken in* vanilla Minecraft **1.21.1**

# 📥Installation:
This resource pack makes swords shorter to give you a better view of the battlefield! The pack is *made for* **all versions between 1.6.1 and 26.1.1**. 

⚠️The short copper sword is *only available* for **versions above 1.21.9** (The Copper Age Update)!

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# ✨Features:
Swords are now shorter to give you a better view of the battlefield!
![Shorter Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z9c1ZZzW/images/cd5fe16856275feafc71321a1422946f973fdcda.png)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 🛠️Versioning:
This ressource pack uses the following versioning system:
- **Base pack:** standard versioning + copper sword or no copper sword (CS/NCS) Minecraft version
  - -> *e.g.* **1.0ncs-1.20.1, 2.4cs-v1.21.9,...**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this resourcepack . Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D
